name: main-staging

tier1.reason: Tier 1 profile and scenarios for main-staging are not standardized in-repo yet.

all.reason: Tier 1 is not yet enabled for main-staging.

isolation_requirements: Pulumi platform stack name distinct from dev (e.g. staging vs dev)
Postgres database sprocket_staging (not sprocket_dev or sprocket_main)
Redis key prefix staging via application config
Dedicated RabbitMQ Swarm service per stack (Traefik hostname rabbitMq.staging.sprocket.mlesports.gg)
Separate Spaces buckets sprocket-staging-1, sprocket-image-gen-staging-1, sprocket-replays-staging-1

notes: Staging is release-candidate shaped; do not point it at production databases or queues.
Confirm DNS matches infra/stack-map.yaml before expecting Tier 0 HTTPS checks to pass.
